text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #21)
> It should be noted that I'm willing to commit this port due to my interest

I really appreciate your support, help and services.  I am sorry that I was super busy on my normal tasks and messy (phone drop in the water :( ). Now, I am trying to put new diff/shar into the system.
